title: COUNSELING MINISTRY - 211info
text: GOOD SAMARITAN MINISTRIES INTERNATIONAL HEADQUARTERS COUNSELING MINISTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based organization that offers a counseling ministry that includes individual, marriage, and men's and women's groups. The groups are run by trained peer counselors. 7929 SW Cirrus Drive Beaverton, OR 97008 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 11am-8pm, Friday 11am-5pm Email (503) 644-2339 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 644-2339 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None; donations accepted DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Faith Based Counseling Peer Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - GSM BEAVERTON GROUPS AND CLASSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
